name: @browserclijs/browser-cli
description: Run browser automation workflows against your logged-in Chrome via Stagehand + Playwriter.

scripts.link: npm run build && pnpm link --global && mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude/skills" "$HOME/.agents/skills" "$HOME/.config/opencode/skills" && ln -sfn "$PWD/skills/browser-cli" "$HOME/.claude/skills/browser-cli" && ln -sfn "$PWD/skills/browser-cli" "$HOME/.agents/skills/browser-cli" && ln -sfn "$PWD/skills/browser-cli" "$HOME/.config/opencode/skills/browser-cli" && echo "linked browser-cli bin + Claude/Codex/OpenCode skills → $PWD"
scripts.unlink: pnpm unlink --global 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$HOME/.claude/skills/browser-cli" "$HOME/.agents/skills/browser-cli" "$HOME/.codex/skills/browser-cli" "$HOME/.config/opencode/skills/browser-cli"; echo "unlinked browser-cli bin + Claude/Codex/OpenCode skills"
